basics.name: Leon-Gerard Vandenberg
basics.label: AI-First Renewable Energy and Digital Grid Executive
basics.summary: AI-first CEO/CTO and founder-operator with 29+ years building trusted edge infrastructure across wireless, embedded security, SIM/eSIM, industrial IoT, fintech, and cloud-connected platforms. The last 8 years have focused on renewable-energy platforms, solar and storage asset intelligence, secure panel-level telemetry, VPP logic, and grid-grade data infrastructure.

work.name: Sunified Group BV / Sunified Technologies BV
work.position: Chief Executive Officer / Chief Technology Officer
work.summary: Leads Sunified's clean energy data infrastructure and hardware trust platform, turning solar and storage assets into secure, high-fidelity data nodes.
highlights: Developed the UNITY / Edge ID thesis: secure panel-level telemetry, source data provenance, and edge-to-cloud services for renewable asset intelligence.
Advanced the Solar Operations Oceania 255 MW distributed solar park / VPP model: 51 x 5 MW solar parks connected to Australia's National Energy Market with storage and dispatch logic.
Frames renewable assets as financeable digital infrastructure: measurable at source, more insurable, more bankable, and more operationally useful to grid stakeholders.
Operates as an AI-first executive using durable memory, agent harnesses, structured research workflows, and automation to compound strategy, outreach, and execution.

work.name: Solara Group
work.position: Chief Technology Officer / Core Technology Founder
work.summary: Built the predecessor renewable-energy data platform around secure hardware modules, proof of green energy production, and energy provenance.
highlights: Connected solar hardware, energy data, blockchain-era provenance concepts, and financeability into the thesis that solar farms become high-fidelity energy data centers.
Led technical narrative across solar IoT, energy data, investor communication, and platform architecture.

work.name: Fuzo Limited
work.summary: SIM/eSIM, HD wallet, financial inclusion, secure identity and value transfer at the mobile edge.

work.name: TDA Tech
work.summary: Trusted Digital Authentication, secure wireless M2M, TOSIM lineage, China manufacturing/R&D.

work.name: AirWave Wireless
work.summary: Silicon Valley WiFi infrastructure, 802.1X / EAP-SIM, Microsoft/Cisco/Intel ecosystem.
